narrative:
Daniel Muñoz is a dynamic right-back for Colombia, boasting an overall rating of 7.32/10. This places him in the top 2% of right-backs at this tournament. His rating range of 6.87–7.76 reflects his consistent impact across matches.

Muñoz has shown a remarkable goal-scoring prowess at this World Cup, netting 0.952 goals per 90 min, significantly higher than his 0.354 expected goals (xG) per 90 min. He also contributes defensively with 2.381 tackles and 2.381 clearances per 90 min. However, his 0.047 expected assists (xA) per 90 min suggests his primary impact is not through creating chances for others.

Muñoz clearly plays a vital role as an attacking full-back for his national team, providing a genuine goal threat from wide areas. Scouts and fans should watch for his continued ability to convert chances at such a high rate, especially given his lower xG. His defensive work rate will also be critical in Colombia's upcoming matches.
